channel.description: Recent content in Natural-Language-Processing on Arrans github.io

item.title: openvinotoolkit/openvino
item.description: OpenVINO™ is an open source toolkit for optimizing and deploying AI inference

item.title: pemistahl/lingua-go
item.description: The most accurate natural language detection library for Go, suitable for short text and mixed-language text
